name: Salt-Baked Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Line a roasting pan with foil.
3. Cover the foil with a thick layer of salt.
4. Sprinkle the chicken cavity with thyme.
5. Stuff the chicken with the whole lemon.
6. Place the chicken, breast side down, on top of the salt.
7. Cover all exposed surfaces completely with remaining salt.
8. Sprinkle with water to seal and place in oven.
9. Bake uncovered for about 1 hour.
10. Remove chicken from oven and let sit for 10 minutes.
11. Break the crust and remove all salt, wiping with a paper towel if necessary.
12. Cut into pieces.
Makes 4 servings.
